subject: Diglett, a small brown mole-like creature poking out of the ground in a field with flowers
description: A small brown mole-like creature pokes up from a hole in the ground, only the top half of its body visible above earth level. The figure has a simple round head with a prominent pink nose and small dark eyes. Around it at ground level, small white daisy-like flowers bloom. The background is an open sky of white and light tones. This is a classic original-series illustration style with clean linework and flat tones. The palette is brown, cream, and white with small green and flower accents.
foreground: small brown mole-like creature emerging from ground hole, surrounded by flowers
background: open bright outdoor setting with white sky
